directive.title: Basic RFQ API endpoints with Neon integration

auditor.summary: The generated code provides a solid foundation with well-structured schema definitions, validation schemas, query functions, audit logging, error handling, and response building. However, the build is critically incomplete: the two route handler files (app/api/rfqs/route.ts and app/api/rfqs/[id]/route.ts) are completely missing, which means no API endpoints actually exist. Additionally, the code depends on 'drizzle-orm' which is not in the package.json dependencies, causing TypeScript compilation to fail. The lib/db/index.ts and lib/db/schema/index.ts files that are required for imports are also missing. These are CRITICAL BUILDABILITY violations that prevent the code from being deployed or tested. The code also lacks test files entirely. The build cannot pass until these fundamental issues are resolved.

top_issues.description: Route handler file is completely missing from generated code. This is required by the build spec (files_to_create includes this file). Without it, no API endpoints exist.
Route handler file is completely missing from generated code. This is required by the build spec (files_to_create includes this file). Without it, no detail/update endpoints exist.
Imports from 'drizzle-orm' which is NOT in package.json dependencies. This will cause TypeScript compilation failure (BUILDABILITY violation).
